fields.headline: Services for Clients
fields.description: Comprehensive support for project owners and employers throughout every stage of the construction process.

fields.headline: Services for Contractors
fields.description: Full quantity surveying and technical support to help contractors deliver projects on time and within budget.

fields.headline: Services for Consultancies
fields.description: Design, technical, and proposal support for architectural and structural consultancy practices.

fields.name: Employer Agent
fields.short_desc: Acting as your representative throughout the project, managing contractor relationships and safeguarding your interests.
fields.body: Our employer agent service places an experienced professional in your corner throughout the construction project. We act as your representative, managing the contractor relationship, administering the contract, and ensuring your interests are protected at every stage.

fields.name: Bid Preparation & Administration
fields.short_desc: Professional tender documentation and bid management to attract the right contractors for your project.
fields.body: We prepare comprehensive tender packages, manage the bid process, evaluate submissions, and provide clear recommendations — ensuring you select the most suitable contractor at the right price.

fields.name: Contractor Procurement & Management
fields.short_desc: Structured procurement processes and ongoing contractor management to keep your project on track.
fields.body: From establishing the procurement strategy to managing contractor performance on site, we provide end-to-end support that reduces risk and drives accountability across your supply chain.

fields.name: Contract Management
fields.short_desc: Expert administration of construction contracts to protect your position and resolve disputes efficiently.
fields.body: We manage all aspects of the contract lifecycle — valuations, change management, claims assessment, and final account settlement — ensuring contractual obligations are met and your exposure to risk is minimised.

fields.name: Regular Project Reporting
fields.short_desc: Clear, timely progress reports so you always know exactly where your project stands.
fields.body: We produce regular, structured project reports covering programme progress, cost performance, risk status, and key decisions — giving you the visibility you need to make informed decisions at every stage.

fields.name: Quantity Surveying
fields.short_desc: Full range of quantity surveying services to ensure accurate cost planning and commercial management.
fields.body: Our quantity surveying team provides comprehensive cost management services from initial estimates through to final account, delivering the commercial certainty your project needs.

fields.name: Tender Preparation
fields.short_desc: Professionally prepared tender submissions that present your capabilities compellingly and competitively.
fields.body: We prepare complete, compliant tender submissions on your behalf — covering pricing strategies, method statements, and programme planning — to maximise your chances of success.

fields.name: Bill of Quantities (BOQ)
fields.short_desc: Accurate, NRM-compliant bills of quantities that provide a solid foundation for pricing and cost control.
fields.body: We produce detailed, standardised bills of quantities that give all tendering parties a common basis for pricing, reducing disputes and enabling accurate cost comparison.

fields.name: Time Schedules
fields.short_desc: Realistic, detailed programme schedules to plan and track your project from start to finish.
fields.body: We develop Gantt charts and detailed construction programmes that reflect the reality of your project — identifying critical paths, resource requirements, and key milestones.

fields.name: BIM Modelling
fields.short_desc: Creating and managing building data throughout the entire lifecycle using a shared 3D model.
fields.body: Our BIM service creates intelligent 3D models that allow architects, engineers, and contractors to collaborate from a single, accurate data source — reducing clashes, improving coordination, and supporting better decision-making throughout the project lifecycle.
fields.meta_desc: Professional BIM modelling for construction and infrastructure projects across the West Midlands.

fields.name: Financial Reports
fields.short_desc: Clear financial reporting to keep costs under control and stakeholders fully informed.
fields.body: We produce regular cost reports, cash flow forecasts, and financial summaries that give contractors and their clients a clear view of project finances — supporting timely decisions and reducing the risk of cost overruns.

fields.name: Contract Handling & Legal Compliance
fields.short_desc: Expert guidance on contractual obligations and legal compliance to protect your business.
fields.body: We advise on the interpretation and administration of standard form contracts (JCT, NEC, FIDIC), ensuring your obligations are met and your rights are protected throughout the project.

fields.name: Proposal Development
fields.short_desc: Compelling, well-structured proposals that win commissions and build client confidence.
fields.body: We support consultancies in developing high-quality proposals for new commissions — from fee strategies and programme planning to narrative development and presentation design.

fields.name: Architectural Drawings
fields.short_desc: Detailed architectural plans produced to the highest standards of accuracy and clarity.
fields.body: We produce comprehensive architectural drawing packages including floor plans, elevations, sections, and detail drawings — fully coordinated with structural and MEP consultants.

fields.name: Structural Design & Calculations
fields.short_desc: Accurate, compliant structural calculations for new builds, extensions, and refurbishments.
fields.body: Our structural design service delivers safe, efficient, and buildable structural solutions backed by rigorous calculations that comply with current UK building regulations and Eurocodes.
fields.meta_desc: Professional structural design and calculations for residential and commercial projects in the West Midlands.

fields.name: Structural Detailing
fields.short_desc: Precise structural detailing drawings that bridge the gap between design and construction.
fields.body: We produce detailed structural drawings — rebar schedules, connection details, steelwork fabrication drawings — that give contractors everything they need to build with confidence.

fields.name: Interior Design
fields.short_desc: Thoughtfully crafted interiors that balance elegance with everyday liveability.
fields.body: Our interior design team creates spaces that reflect your vision and lifestyle — from concept development and material selection through to detailed drawings and contractor briefing.

fields.name: 3D Building Visualisation
fields.short_desc: High-quality, immersive 3D renderings that bring designs to life and support confident decision-making.
fields.body: We produce photorealistic 3D visualisations and animations that allow clients to experience their building before a single brick is laid — ideal for planning applications, marketing materials, and client presentations.
fields.meta_desc: Photorealistic 3D architectural visualisations for planning, marketing, and client presentations.

fields.name: Construction Web Design
fields.short_desc: Modern, user-friendly websites for construction businesses — search engine optimised and built to convert.
fields.body: We design and build professional websites tailored specifically to construction and consultancy businesses — showcasing your portfolio, services, and expertise in a way that generates enquiries and builds credibility.
